## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test` pass (if Rust changed)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Change fits Tapa's reader-first scope (see README Non-goals)
